textByHash.06bef5684db9ebd588bb81a18a29f7488df72c6f: Then I'll clap ye in Runes!
textByHash.0e9a7c250a88beff45155b13ae933fb7e504d2e3: Hey you! I can smell the 'rum' on ye!
textByHash.16f5207cf2641318481713806e0e355a24e1f873: Whadda we want? 'Rum'! When do we want it? Now!
textByHash.1821fc2cf3529f5bfb2700860811b263a9c2c5ed: Not really lad. If ye were to give us 'rum' we'd kill ye quickly, as opposed to over a few weeks.
textByHash.1b53286bfea2b0b0e44eb252351dba9cac8d36d8: Arr, that he will. I'll tell...
textByHash.3ffbc221d1d6889a59a7de5f002e5b116348ca7b: Ye be a good lass, fer a filthy livin' landlubber.
textByHash.4613f4246bf770e89d786b6c0ec0417331e8cd37: Stop lass! I'll shatter me ribs!
textByHash.479877af48302514b77057659c4f561487a6cce5: Arr, lass, you tried to trick me, but i was too clever for ye!
textByHash.4bff92971eb612eb9279ca20649d29d431d3900b: Stop lad! I'll shatter me ribs!
textByHash.6579b8d8de2c36c67c9f70b713a65142f6627c93: If it isn't in my belly by the time I cout ter three, I'll have ye flogged!
textByHash.8ec209a29d971d2a684dc168005066c73fb38154: Arr, lad, you tried to trick me, but i was too clever for ye!
textByHash.918b8dfab29c85dcacd5b376dbeea63d750d7125: Don't ye worry, lass. After we take the island I'll have the boss haul yer body to the temple and...
textByHash.9e75d241ff2cc3d9b0c0ca36e2366331d0bb7f88: Well, ye'll be glad to know that after that little performance I'd be glad to have ye on me crew!
textByHash.c40b50a4466d038c394ee5910008598323625a43: Don't ye worry, lad. After we take the island I'll have the boss haul yer body to the temple and...
textByHash.c5588cdd43a5cdf3faa841eba8e007733a201b19: Be that the finest, most abrasive 'rum' I've ever smelled?
textByHash.d1189e0c2abcf87a4943bc88b00866afd92c995b: Aye! Now get ye gone, and don't return without more 'rum'!
textByHash.d1e43ba0117da3265d965cca3790e9faab41a0ce: Gadzooks lass, that be the funniest thing I've heard all day! Say it again!
textByHash.d84ea1b97c62c1c463dfa70e987d282d18a69e7c: Hand it over or I'll run ye through!
textByHash.de9367edffd05ad4ca620291896bb0d6385db5a0: Besides, Rabid Jack would have my hide if I told ye it were him that sent me!
textByHash.df7342734525f9d229a1b715f4edc5d07cf25e49: Not really lass. If ye were to give us 'rum' we'd kill ye quickly, as opposed to over a few weeks.
textByHash.f4a57ccc125683308fb30e13575a6f50242eea28: Course, I'll have te kill ye first.
textByHash.f5a269e4b7d249feadde7299d74e9533d8d46c9d: Ye be a good lad, fer a filthy livin' landlubber.
textByHash.ff7c70afccaa9453455ba088f372f79f2cb8a7b3: Ye tried to trick old Donnie!
textByHash.ff8d3902a2c6b7c4354b4e2916e405a517bba49c: Gadzooks lad, that be the funniest thing I've heard all day! Say it again!
